message:
feat(algorithms,readwrite): add NX-compat aliases, weighted edgelist writer, node attr removal, and multigraph write guards

fnx-algorithms/src/lib.rs:
- Add `info()` and `lexicographical_topological_sort()` name aliases for
  NetworkX API compatibility
- Add `write_weighted_edgelist()` to generate "u v weight" formatted lines
- Add `remove_node_attributes()` to strip a named attribute from all nodes
  by rebuilding the graph
- Refactor nested `if let` + condition into let-chain syntax in
  `spectral_bisection` BFS loop
- Replace `edges.len() >= 1` with idiomatic `!edges.is_empty()` in
  bfs_beam_edges test
- Simplify `match` on Option to `if let` in stoer_wagner disconnected test
- Remove unused complement_digraph / reverse_digraph test imports
- Fix trailing brace balance

fnx-python/src/readwrite.rs:
- Add `reject_multigraph_write()` guard that returns a clear TypeError when
  a serializer would silently drop parallel edges
- Wire the guard into write_edgelist, write_adjlist, node_link_data,
  write_graphml, and write_gml entry points

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
